justification: All pass criteria met: 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented, Error thrown with code 'INVALID_TRANSITION' via subclass, both terminal states enforced with empty Sets, 24 tests covering all valid transitions and multiple invalid transitions, AC6 explicitly tested, no external libraries, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs.

observations.text: All 5 valid transitions correctly implemented with O(1) Set lookup
InvalidTransitionError subclass with readonly code property satisfies the Error-with-code requirement cleanly
Terminal states enforced structurally via empty Sets — covers both DELIVERED and CANCELLED
24 tests across all 6 ACs including parameterized invalid transition coverage for both terminal states
Tests verify error shape (instanceof, code property, message) not just that something throws
